  "findings": [
    "Non-IC rated recessed luminaire (can light) is in direct contact with thermal insulation, creating a severe fire hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the non-IC rated fixture with an IC-rated fixture, or pull back the insulation to maintain a minimum 3-inch clearance from the fixture enclosure."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 410.116(B) explicitly prohibits non-IC-rated recessed luminaires from being in contact with combustible materials or thermal insulation. A clearance of at least 3 inches must be maintained from thermal insulation unless the fixture is identified as Type IC.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 410.116(A)(1)",
    "NEC 410.116(B)"
  ]
}
